UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user profile in the TurnosYa application, capable of acting as a customer, professional, or administrator. This entity links to an external authentication system.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserProfile entity.

externalAuthId.description: Identifier from an external authentication system, used to link this profile to an authenticated user. (Security Note: No sensitive authentication data like passwords should be stored here).

phoneNumber.description: The user's phone number, used for WhatsApp reminders and communication.

role.description: The user's primary role within the application (e.g., 'customer', 'professional', 'admin').

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user profile was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the user profile was last updated.

Salon.title: Salon
Salon.description: Represents a hair salon or barbershop where services are provided and appointments are scheduled.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Salon entity.

name.description: The official name of the salon.

address.description: The physical address of the salon.

phoneNumber.description: The primary contact phone number for the salon.

email.description: The primary contact email address for the salon.

primaryColor.description: Hex code for the salon's primary branding color.

adminMembers.description: Map of user IDs to boolean for administrative access.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the salon record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the salon record was last updated.

Service.title: Service
Service.description: Defines a service offered by a salon, including its duration and price.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Service entity.

salonId.description: Reference to the Salon offering this service. (Relationship: Salon 1:N Service)

name.description: The name of the service (e.g., 'Haircut', 'Beard Trim').

description.description: A detailed description of the service.

duration.description: The estimated duration of the service in minutes.

isActive.description: Indicates if the service is currently active and available for booking.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the service record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the service record was last updated.

Professional.title: Professional
Professional.description: Represents a professional (e.g., barber, stylist) working at a salon, linking to a UserProfile and detailing their services and availability.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Professional entity.

userId.description: Reference to the associated UserProfile entity. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:1 Professional)

salonId.description: Reference to the Salon where the professional works. (Relationship: Salon 1:N Professional)

bio.description: A short biography or description of the professional.

avatarUrl.description: URL to the professional's profile image.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the professional record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the professional record was last updated.

GlobalAdmin.title: GlobalAdmin
GlobalAdmin.description: Special entity to designate super-users with access to all data.
